description: A main circulation pump has failed, halting production. A maintenance technician must respond to the emergency work order.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the high-priority work order for the pump failure.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accepts the work order, changing its status to 'In Progress'.

nodes.task_description: Check the spare parts inventory to see if a replacement pump or motor is in stock.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a complete replacement pump assembly is available in the warehouse.

nodes.task_description: Document the cause of failure and the parts used, and close the work order upon completion of the replacement.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the work order with failure analysis, confirms the repair, and formally closes it.
